name: The Islander Club

shortDescription: The Islander Club of Longboat Key is a gated Gulf-front condominium community of two twelve-story towers set on 400 feet of private beachfront. The towers have a clubhouse, fitness center, pool and two Har-Tru tennis courts and are great for those looking for a social, active lifestyle.

It’s ideal for buyers who want a quieter luxury feel—more “private resort residence” than high-rise tower—while staying right on the beach.

name: Grand Bay (Bay Isles)
subtitle: Welcome to Grand Bay - a gated Bay Isles community of six bayfront towers right next to the golf course with incredible views of the Bay.
shortDescription: Grand Bay is a luxury tower community behind its own gate within Bay Isles, with 272 residences across six buildings right next to the Harbourside golf course and Sarasota Bay. The community comes with two heated pools, tennis courts, a fitness center, concierge service, and deeded Bay Isles Beach Club access on the Gulf.

subtitle: Explore Marina Bay, a Bay Isles condominium community that offers large residences and a full suite of resort amenities.
shortDescription: Marina Bay is a gated Bay Isles condo community of 60 residences on the south end of Longboat Key. Three mid-rise buildings hold just four homes per floor, with excellent views of the Bay, the nearby harbor or golf course.  Residents enjoy a heated pool and spa, two tennis courts, a fitness room, walking paths, and private beach access through the Bay Isles Beach Club.

name: Lands End

shortDescription: Lands End is a small gated community of 12 custom residences set among lush tropical landscaping along Longboat Key's northern tip. Shared amenities include community docks, a pool and a tennis/pickleball court. The location at the island's northern tip puts Longbeach Village and the white sand of the Gulf beach within an easy walk.

name: Harbour Circle (Bay Isles)
subtitle: Discover Harbour Circle, a 42-villa Bay Isles community bordering the Harbourside golf course - maintenance-free living where you still own your land, with beach club access included.
shortDescription: Harbour Circle is a gated Bay Isles community of 42 Spanish-style villas bordering the Longboat Key Club's Harbourside golf course, with a community pool and spa and The Moorings marina within walking distance. It offers a rare combination: maintenance-free living where residents own the land beneath their villas, so several homes have private pools of their own. Ownership includes deeded access to the private Bay Isles Beach Club on the Gulf.

name: Silver Sands
subtitle: Discover Silver Sands, a beachfront resort-style community offering vacation-friendly amenities.
shortDescription: Silver Sands stands out as a pure beachfront resort-style property with pool amenities and easy Gulf access. Consider it if you want a simple vacation-friendly condo setting.

shortDescription: Beachplace is a large resort-style beachfront community with several resort-style amenities. These include private beach access, a community pool, clubhouse, fitness center, and tennis/pickleball.

name: Longboat Arms

Residents enjoy deeded beach access and optional membership at the Longboat Key Club across the street adds golf, tennis, and spa privileges.

subtitle: Explore Sage Longboat Key, a boutique luxury enclave offering wellness amenities and beachfront exclusivity.
shortDescription: Sage Longboat Key is one of the newest boutique Gulf-front condominiums on Longboat Key. There are just 16 residences here. Each home spans the full width of the building, with views of both the Gulf and Sarasota Bay. Wellness anchors the design, from air and water filtration to a beautiful pool, spa, fitness center, and yoga studio.

name: Harbour Court (Bay Isles)
subtitle: Harbour Court is an 18-villa bayfront enclave in Bay Isles where every home includes a private deeded dock and a beautiful view of the Bay.
shortDescription: Harbour Court is a boutique Bay Isles enclave of bayfront villas, each with a deep-water dock for boats up to 30 feet. The community offers a pool, tennis, maintenance-free living and Beach Club access. It stands out for those who want built-in boating with gorgeous bay views.

name: Westchester
subtitle: Discover Westchester, a residential condominium offering pool amenities and relaxed living.
shortDescription: Westchester is a residential condo community with two heated pools, a clubhouse, and on-site management that supports an easy, low-maintenance lifestyle. It’s a great fit for buyers who want a relaxed community feel and strong everyday amenities without paying for a massive resort-style tower environment.

name: Casa Del Mar

shortDescription: Casa Del Mar is a Gulf-front condominium community offering direct beach access, a beachfront pool, and tennis and pickleball courts. It's well suited for buyers wanting a casual, resort-style setting with strong vacation, seasonal, and rental income appeal.

name: Longboat Terrace
subtitle: Discover Longboat Terrace - small, beachfront townhome-style condos that offer direct Gulf access, a heated pool, social clubhouse and more.
shortDescription: Longboat Terrace is a small beachfront community of 36 townhouse-style condos on the north end of Longboat Key. Two-story floor plans with screened lanais look out over the Gulf, and brick paver pathways lead residents straight to the sand. A gulf-side heated pool and a clubhouse with a fitness room round out a low-key, walkable island lifestyle.

name: The Beach on Longboat Key
subtitle: Explore The Beach on Longboat Key, a beachfront condominium offering resort-style living.
shortDescription: The Beach on Longboat Key is a Gulf-front resort-style condo/hotel setup with on-site amenities like a heated Gulf-front pool, private beach access, and a BBQ/grilling area. It’s ideal if you want true beachfront with a “lock-and-leave” vibe that feels more like a boutique resort stay.

name: Conrad Beach
subtitle: Conrad Beach is a boutique north-end community that gives you access to both the beach and Longboat Key dining.
shortDescription: Conrad Beach is a boutique north-end enclave offering maintenance-free lawn care with shared community amenities like a neighborhood pool. It also gives you beach access while being close to the restaurants and shops located in north Longboat Key.

Amenities are plentiful and include a private beach, a large heated pool and spa, four Har-Tru tennis courts, a putting green, and a clubhouse with a fitness center.

shortDescription: Harbour Oaks is a gated Bay Isles villa community where many of the residences back directly onto the Harbourside golf course. Amenities include a community pool, maintenance-free living and Beach Club access. It suits buyers who want golf-view living within Bay Isles.

shortDescription: Villa di Lancia is a Gulf-front community with a resort-style clubhouse (fitness + sauna), a pool and hot tub, and two Har-Tru tennis courts that also accommodate pickleball. It’s a strong pick for buyers who want a true “beach + racquet sports” lifestyle in a well-amenitized, established Longboat Key community.

name: Sea Grape Inn

shortDescription: The Sea Grape Inn is a quiet 8-unit beachfront condo-resort on Longboat Key. Every individually owned condo has a view of the pool and the Gulf. An on-site manager runs a daily, weekly, and monthly rental program, making it a favorite for owners who want beach income between stays.

name: Islands West
subtitle: Explore Islands West, a beachfront high-rise offering tennis, fitness, and panoramic Gulf views.
shortDescription: Islands West is a Gulf-front high-rise featuring private beach access, a heated beachfront pool, fitness center, sauna, tennis, and social spaces. It offers a traditional beachfront tower lifestyle with strong core amenities.

name: Beach Castle
subtitle: Discover Beach Castle, a Gulf-to-Bay condominium community offering private beach access in a straightforward coastal retreat setting.
shortDescription: Beach Castle is a Gulf-to-Bay condominium community offering private beach access, a pool, a fishing pier in the Bay and a laid-back setting. It’s best suited for people seeking a casual coastal retreat and direct sand access.

name: Jewfish Key
subtitle: Explore Jewfish Key, a private island accessible by boat near Longboat Key that offers privacy, waterfront living, and a true off-grid-style island feel.
shortDescription: Jewfish Key is a private island of roughly 38 acres in the Intracoastal Waterway off the northern tip of Longboat Key, accessible only by boat. There are a small number of elevated waterfront homes on acre-plus lots with private docks and panoramic water views. Longboat Key's restaurants, marinas, and shops are just minutes away, making it a rare blend of genuine seclusion and everyday convenience.

shortDescription: Sunset Beach is a gated, Gulf-front community centered around a heated pool and spa/hot tub, with under-building/assigned parking that keeps the day-to-day easy. It’s a strong choice for buyers who want secure, no-fuss beachfront living in a more intimate complex.

name: Longboat Key Estates
subtitle: Experience Longboat Key Estates, a quiet residential community offering boating access and a relaxed island lifestyle.
shortDescription: Longboat Key Estates is a quiet residential neighborhood with a strong boating orientation and relaxed island setting. It’s ideal for buyers who want privacy and everyday livability on the Key.

name: Neptune
subtitle: Explore Neptune, a quaint condo community that offers an Old Florida feel while being a walk-to-everything location, with the beach just across the road.
shortDescription: Neptune on Longboat Key is a boutique community of 12 condos tucked into the island. Pet friendly and few amenities to speak of, this is simple island living with the beach a short walk across the street. Publix, the library, and the public courts at Bayfront Park are all nearby as well.

name: Sands Point
subtitle: Discover Sands Point, a unique condo community offering secluded beach access and waterfront amenities.
shortDescription: Sands Point is a gated condo community right on the sand at the southern tip of Longboat Key. Its distinctive oval building sits on 17 acres with a private beach and tiki huts on one side and a protected marina on the other. Residents enjoy a heated pool and spa, community room, boat slips and fishing pier.

name: Infinity
subtitle: Infinity is an ultra-luxury Gulf-front condominium with private elevator entry, coastal contemporary architecture and an array of amenities.
shortDescription: Infinity is a boutique Gulf-front condominium of just 11 residences. Known for its coastal contemporary architecture and private-elevator entries,  Infinity also includes a heated beachfront pool and spa, sun deck with direct beach access, clubhouse with catering kitchen, fitness center, and tennis/pickleball courts - all behind a gated entry.

name: Buttonwood Cove
subtitle: Explore Buttonwood Cove, a Gulf-to-Bay community offering boating access, beach privileges, and recreational facilities.
shortDescription: Buttonwood Cove is a Gulf-to-Bay community offering beautiful Bay-side views while providing private beach access just across the street. Other amenities include personal boat slips, tennis, pickleball, a clubhouse, and a pool. Consider this community if you want both boating and beach access.

name: Seascape
subtitle: Experience Seascape, a boutique Gulf-front condominium offering quiet beachfront living.
shortDescription: Seascape is a small, quiet Gulf-front condo community with direct beach access plus straightforward essentials like a heated pool and elevator service. It’s a great fit if you want “low-drama” beachfront living in a more intimate setting.

name: La Playa
subtitle: Explore La Playa, a Gulf-front condominium offering direct beach access and relaxed small-resort appeal.
shortDescription: La Playa is an intimate Gulf-front community of just 21 residences set directly on a private beach in the heart of Longboat Key. Amenities include a heated pool and beachfront grills just off the sand. As one of the few communities on the island that permits short-term rentals, it draws owners who want a beach residence that can also generate rental income.

name: Sea Oats
subtitle: Welcome to Sea Oats - a small beachfront condominium that offers a private retreat on the sands of the Gulf.
shortDescription: Sea Oats is a quiet 8-unit condominium community right on the sands of the Gulf. Its homes are among the smallest footprints on the island, with private beach access steps from every door. Sea Oats is great for buyers who want simple beachfront living without resort amenities or crowds.

name: Sand Cay Beach Resort
subtitle: Discover Sand Cay Beach Resort - a condominium community that offers a private beach, fun amenities, and flexible short-term rentals.
shortDescription: Sand Cay Beach Resort is a Gulf-front condo community of 60 furnished condos on Longboat Key. It is one of the few communities on the island that allows short vacation rentals, with an in-house rental office and a full-time on-site manager. Amenities include a private beach, heated pool, a tennis and pickleball court, shuffleboard, and beachside grills.

items.address: 4725 Gulf Of Mexico Drive Unit 314, Longboat Key, FL 34228

name: The Beachcomber
subtitle: Experience the Beachcomber, a Gulf-front condominium offering walk-out beach access and classic Longboat Key charm.
shortDescription: The Beachcomber is a direct Gulf-front condominium known for private beach access, a beachfront pool, and relaxed living along the shoreline. It’s a classic Longboat Key beachfront option for those seeking simplicity, Gulf views, and walk-out beach proximity.

name: Banyan Bay Club
subtitle: Discover the Banyan Bay Club, a Gulf-to-Bay community offering beach access, boating amenities, and an active waterfront lifestyle.
shortDescription: The Banyan Bay Club is a unique Gulf-to-Bay community featuring a clubhouse, pool, fitness center, tennis/pickleball court, and a bayside dock. Its rare dual-waterfront layout makes it appealing for buyers who want both beach relaxation and boating lifestyle amenities.

shortDescription: The Cabana Beach Club is a Gulf-front condominium community featuring private beach access, a heated pool, and outdoor grilling areas in an intimate low-rise setting. Its beachfront atmosphere makes it a strong fit for those seeking a quiet coastal retreat with classic Old Florida charm.

name: Grand Mariner
subtitle: Welcome to Grand Mariner - a yachting community on Sarasota Bay with private deep-water slips for vessels up to 70 feet and estate-scale floor plans with resort amenities.
shortDescription: Grand Mariner is a boutique community of estate-sized condominiums on Sarasota Bay at the north end of Longboat Key. Built around a private protected harbor with deep-water slips for vessels up to 70 feet, this community features a heated bayfront pool, tennis and a fitness center.

name: Tiffany Plaza
subtitle: Discover Tiffany Plaza, a boutique beachfront building offering private beach access.
shortDescription: Tiffany Plaza is a smaller Gulf-front building with a heated pool, clubhouse/meeting space, sauna, grilling area, and a private beach walkway (plus handy extras like storage/tiki hut beach storage noted by local listing sources). It’s appealing for buyers who want intimate beachfront living with the core amenities done right.

name: Seahorse Beach Resort
subtitle: Explore Seahorse Beach Resort, a condo-hotel directly on the beach with a flexible rental program that generates income while you're away.
shortDescription: Seahorse Beach Resort is a 36-unit condo-hotel directly on the beach in Longboat Key. Every unit has a full kitchen and nearly all open to balconies or patios facing the water. Amenities include a heated pool and a wide private beach below. An on-site office runs nightly rentals, making it one of the island's most flexible income properties for owners who want a beach getaway that generates income.

name: The Bayou (Bay Isles)
subtitle: Explore The Bayou, a Bay Isles single-family neighborhood offering waterfront, golf, and garden homesites behind the gates.
shortDescription: The Bayou is a Bay Isles single-family neighborhood with homes along the Bay Isles Waterway as well as golf and garden lots. It’s appealing for buyers seeking custom-home living within the gates.

items.address: 3301 Bayou Road, Longboat Key, FL 34228

name: Laguna Yacht Village
subtitle: Explore Laguna Yacht Village, a small gated enclave on Longboat Key's north end that offers deeded deep-water docks, deeded beach access across the street, and single-family living with condominium ease.
shortDescription: Laguna Yacht Village is a gated waterfront enclave of just 8 homes on Longboat Key's north end. Each residence comes with a deeded deep-water boat dock with no fixed bridges on the way to the Intracoastal Waterway and the Gulf. Other amenities include a community pool and deeded beach access.

items.address: 6322 Laguna Drive Unit 1, Longboat Key, FL 34228

name: Windward Bay
subtitle: Experience Windward Bay, a Gulf-to-Bay community offering boating access and beach privileges.
shortDescription: Windward Bay is a Gulf-to-Bay community with deeded beach access across the street, two pools, a fitness center with sauna, tennis and pickleball, clubhouse spaces, and helpful extras like kayak storage and walking trails. It’s an excellent choice for buyers who want “boating + beach” flexibility in one place, with a deep amenity bench and a residential (not resort-hotel) feel.

items.address: 4720 Gulf Of Mexico Drive Unit Villa 2, Longboat Key, FL 34228
4500 Gulf Of Mexico Drive Unit 206, Longboat Key, FL 34228

name: Portobello
subtitle: Explore Portobello, a Gulf-to-Bay condominium community that offers a private beach, Bay-side boating, and much more.
shortDescription: Portobello is a Gulf-to-Bay condo community in the middle of Longboat Key. Each side has a mid-rise building and residents enjoy private beach access, a heated community pool, tennis/pickleball courts, a clubhouse and a bayside day dock with fishing pier.

items.address: 3240 Gulf Of Mexico Drive Unit B104, Longboat Key, FL 34228
3240 Gulf Of Mexico Drive Unit B402, Longboat Key, FL 34228

name: Sea Pines
subtitle: Explore Sea Pines - a secluded beachfront community at the northern tip of Longboat Key that offers a private beach, a large heated pool, and one of the island's friendliest pet policies.
shortDescription: Sea Pines is a gated community of 28 condos directly on the beach at the far north end of Longboat Key. Residents here enjoy a large heated pool and a private path to the sand. With a flexible pet and rental policy it pairs beachfront living with flexibility.

name: Longboat Harbour Towers
subtitle: Experience Longboat Harbour - the ultimate bayside boating community on Sarasota Bay that offers boat slips, four heated pools, and one of the island's deepest amenity lineups.
shortDescription: Longboat Harbour is likely the ultimate Bay-side boating community on Longboat Key. It consists of around 300 condominiums with berths for more than 50 boats and accommodates vessels up to 34 feet. Amenities include tennis/pickleball courts, a fitness center, a large bayfront clubhouse, active social calendar and more.

items.address: 4401 Gulf Of Mexico Drive Unit 601, Longboat Key, FL 34228

name: Longboat Landing
subtitle: Longboat Landing is an intimate bayfront community that offers a relaxing experience that includes boat slips, a community pool and a tennis/pickleball court.
shortDescription: Longboat Landing is a small Bay-front condo community with only 9 units within a quiet setting. Amenities include boat slips with a dock, community pool, tennis/pickleball court, and more. It stands out for buyers who want a boutique condominium on the Bay with beach access and a less crowded feel.

items.address: 5320 Gulf Of Mexico Drive Unit 101, Longboat Key, FL 34228

name: Sutton Place
subtitle: Experience Sutton Place, a bayside community offering beach access and boating amenities.
shortDescription: Sutton Place is a bayside community with deeded private beach access, two pools, a clubhouse, fishing pier, and boat slips. Great for combining boating with beach access.

subtitle: Explore Bayview Estates, a Longboat Key waterfront neighborhood with a mix of older island homes, renovations, and newer custom builds.
shortDescription: Bayview Estates is a waterfront neighborhood on the north end of Longboat Key, where most homes sit on deep-water canals with no fixed bridges to the Intracoastal and the bay. The single-family homes range from established island residences to fully rebuilt new construction.

items.address: 569 Bayview Drive, Longboat Key, FL 34228

name: Sea Gate Club
subtitle: Explore Sea Gate Club, a classic Gulf-front condominium tower that offers a beautiful private beach and a solid set of amenities.
shortDescription: Sea Gate Club is a Gulf-front condominium tower of 90 residences on Longboat Key, set on the beach with golf across the street and the island's main shopping plaza steps away. Residents enjoy a Gulf-side heated pool and spa, tennis, a fitness center, a social room, and on-site management. Most homes are two-bedroom split plans with floor-to-ceiling windows and balconies framing Gulf and bay views.

name: Longbeach Village
subtitle: Discover Longbeach Village, a historic north Longboat Key neighborhood offering Old Florida charm and walkable coastal living.
shortDescription: Longbeach Village is the island's original settlement, a historic neighborhood of around 290 homes at the northern tip of Longboat Key. The homes here are a mix Old Florida cottages, bungalows and renovated coastal homes. With no HOA, no gates, and bayfront restaurants, it offers a genuine village life.

shortDescription: The Harbour Villa Club is an intimate bayfront condominium community on the north end of Longboat Key. Every unit includes a deeded boat slip in the community's deep-water marina, which handles vessels up to the 50 to 60 foot range. Residences are designed to capture bay views from the living area and primary bedroom.

shortDescription: La Firenza is a gated Gulf-front condominium community of just 10 residences on Longboat Key's mid-key stretch. This community is known for its estate-scale homes of around 3,500 to 4,800 square feet. Residents share a heated pool and spa between the buildings, and a clubhouse with a social room, owners' lounge, catering kitchen, fitness facilities, and sauna.

shortDescription: The Bay Isles Harbor Section is a luxurious, canal-style neighborhood inside larger Bay Isles. This upscale community is for those who want a secure, boating-friendly community with bay access on Longboat Key.

shortDescription: Whitney Beach is an amenity-rich, beach-oriented community offering tennis/pickleball, shuffleboard, a resort-style heated pool, BBQ/picnic areas, and kayak launching—plus private beach access through the Whitney Beach Conservancy. It’s a standout for buyers who want an active, outdoorsy Longboat lifestyle with a uniquely protected, private-beach feel.

name: Northgate
subtitle: Explore Northgate, a boutique waterfront condo getaway that offers a waterside pool, covered parking, tennis court and docks.
shortDescription: Northgate of Longboat Key is a tucked-away waterfront community of just 9 residences at the northern tip of Longboat Key. The community enjoys a waterside pool, tennis court, and small docks for kayaks and boats. The beach waits at the end of the street, with the north end's favorite restaurants a short stroll away.

items.address: 490 Shore Road Unit 6, Longboat Key, FL 34228

name: The Shore
subtitle: Experience The Shore, a Gulf-front condominium offering classic beachfront amenities.
shortDescription: The Shore is a Gulf-front community with a classic “beach club” feel—heated beachfront pool and spa, clubhouse/social spaces (often including library/social room), fitness room, sauna, and convenient private/covered parking. It’s worth a look if you want direct beach access with solid amenities, without the scale of a large high-rise.

name: Aquarius Club
subtitle: Discover the Aquarius Club - a luxury Gulf-front condominium offering resort-style amenities and a private beachfront lifestyle.
shortDescription: The Aquarius Club is a luxury Gulf-front condominium with resort-style features like tennis/pickleball, a pool, fitness center, and beautiful common spaces. It's exclusive beachfront is also stunning.

name: Weston Pointe (Bay Isles)
subtitle: Discover Weston Pointe, a small Bay Isles enclave offering gated living near shopping, tennis, and marina amenities.
shortDescription: Weston Pointe is a small Bay Isles enclave positioned near shopping, the library, tennis facilities, and the Moorings marina. It’s ideal for buyers who want gated living with exceptional day-to-day convenience.

items.address: 617 Weston Pointe Court, Longboat Key, FL 34228

name: Veinte
subtitle: Experience Veinte, an exclusive beachfront community offering boutique luxury living.
shortDescription: Veinte is an exclusive Gulf-front community known for being small and private, with direct beach access plus amenities like a Gulf-facing pool and on-site fitness; listing sources also note a tennis/pickleball court and gated/secure entry. It’s best for buyers who want “few neighbors, big water views,” and a quieter luxury footprint.

name: Harbour Links (Bay Isles)
subtitle: Experience Harbour Links, a small Bay Isles community offering beautiful golf-course views from your backyard.
shortDescription: Harbour Links is a small Bay Isles enclave known for golf-course views within a gated setting. Amenities here include a community pool with Bay Isles Beach Club membership. It’s a strong pick for buyers seeking low-density Bay Isles living with an upscale residential feel.

name: Sabal Cove (Bay Isles)
subtitle: Explore Sabal Cove, a gated Bay Isles neighborhood that offers custom-built homes, deeded beach club access, and a garden-like setting.
shortDescription: Sabal Cove is a gated neighborhood of 38 custom single-family homes inside Bay Isles on Longboat Key. Each home is one of a kind, set behind lush landscaping and beside a quiet lagoon. Owners enjoy access to the private Bay Isles Beach Club and optional membership to the Longboat Key Club.

name: Turtle Crawl Inn
subtitle: Explore Turtle Crawl Inn, a Gulf-front condominium offering resort-style accommodations.
shortDescription: Turtle Crawl Inn is a Gulf-front, resort-style condo property with a heated pool, beach access, and “easy vacation living” perks like grills/BBQ areas and tropical grounds (frequently highlighted by guest-facing materials). It’s a strong match for buyers who want a casual, stay-and-play beachfront setup rather than a formal luxury tower.

name: Hideaway Bay
subtitle: Explore Hideaway Bay - a secluded single-family enclave on Millar Bay with deep-water docks within a hidden peninsula setting on the north end of Longboat Key.
shortDescription: Hideaway Bay is a small, secluded single-family community along Millar Bay, reached by a winding mangrove-lined road on the north end of Longboat Key. Homes here feature deep-water docks and nearby tennis/pickleball courts. Custom residences sit on generous tropical lots with views of Sarasota Bay.

items.address: 757 Hideaway Bay Drive, Longboat Key, FL 34228

name: Queens Harbour (Bay Isles)
subtitle: Explore Queens Harbour, a gated waterfront community that offers maintenance-free homes, a heated community pool, and deeded beach club access.
shortDescription: Queens Harbour is a gated waterfront community of single-family homes inside Bay Isles on Longboat Key. Residents enjoy maintenance-free living, a heated community pool, and deeded access to the private Bay Isles Beach Club. Homes offer beautiful views of Sarasota Bay, community lakes, or the golf course. Some homes also include private docks.

shortDescription: Club Longboat is a beachfront condominium community featuring eight tennis courts, two heated pools, a fitness center, and clubhouse. It's perfect for those who want an amenity-rich community with plenty of social activities happening regularly.

shortDescription: The Spanish Main Yacht Club is a 55+ community offering a clubhouse, pool, boating slips, and beach access. It’s a strong option for buyers seeking social, maintenance-friendly living with boating perks.

shortDescription: En Provence is a 21-residence ultra-luxury community on six Gulf-front acres near the south end of Longboat Key, with estate-scale floor plans of 3,400 to over 6,000 square feet, private elevators, and enclosed garages. Amenities include a heated beachfront pool and spa, fitness center, clubhouse with catering kitchen, concierge, and 24-hour guard-gated security.

name: Cedars West
subtitle: Discover Cedars West, a rare Gulf-front condominium community on Longboat Key's quiet north end - beach living with the Cedars Tennis Resort & Club just across the street.
shortDescription: Cedars West is a Gulf-front condominium community of two-story residences on Longboat Key's north end, with its own heated pool and tennis courts, plus the Cedars Tennis Resort's courts and clubhouse just across the street.

items.address: 5655 Gulf Of Mexico Drive Unit D107, Longboat Key, FL 34228

name: The Castillian
subtitle: Explore The Castillian, a classic Gulf-front tower offering tennis, pool amenities, and traditional beachfront living.
shortDescription: The Castillian is a classic Gulf-front condo community offering a great set of amenities that include a tennis/pickleball court, a pool, clubhouse, outdoor kitchen, covered parking and more. This community is great for those who want a straightforward Longboat Key beach lifestyle.

name: Positano
subtitle: Explore Positano, a stunning Gulf-front community that offers spacious residences, a private beach, and a staffed gatehouse.
shortDescription: Positano is a very exclusive community right on the Gulf, where just 29 residences share 10 landscaped acres. Amenities include a a beachside clubhouse, fitness facilities, a heated pool and spa, and private garages beneath each building. Residences are expansive with many having private elevators.

name: Longboat Beach House
subtitle: Explore Longboat Beach House, a boutique mid-key building of just 22 condominiums set directly on the Gulf that offers private beach access, a heated pool, and a pet-friendly, monthly-rental-friendly policy.
shortDescription: Longboat Beach House is a boutique Gulf-front building of just 22 condominiums rising six floors directly on the sand at the middle of Longboat Key. Two-bedroom residences open to balconies with sweeping Gulf views, while a heated pool, a beachfront grill and outdoor shower, and a remodeled beachfront social room with catering kitchen anchor the amenities. Small pets are welcome and monthly rentals are permitted, making it as flexible as it is intimate.

name: Cedars East

shortDescription: Cedars East is located within the Cedars Tennis Resort, offering access to Har-Tru tennis and pickleball courts, a Junior Olympic pool, fitness facilities, and clubhouse amenities. It’s ideal for buyers seeking an active, sports-centric lifestyle in a resort-style setting.

Amenities include a heated pool and spa, a clubhouse with fitness center, concierge services, and direct access to the private beach.

name: Privateer

Owners can place their units in the resort's rental program and earn approximately half the revenue from resort-guest stays. Residents enjoy a pool, fitness center, beach access, and optional Longboat Key Club membership.

name: L'Ambiance
subtitle: Discover L'Ambiance, beautiful Gulf-front towers with private elevator foyers, a resort-style pool, tennis courts, and concierge service on the island's south end.
shortDescription: L'Ambiance is a gated Gulf-front condominium community behind the Longboat Key Club gates. Residences enjoy private elevator foyers, no shared walls, expansive terraces, and views spanning the Gulf. Amenities include a resort-style heated pool and spa, two Har-Tru tennis courts, a fitness center with sauna and steam rooms, guest suites, concierge, 24-hour security, and optional Longboat Key Club membership.

name: Corey's Landing (Bay Isles)
subtitle: Discover Corey’s Landing, a gated Bay Isles neighborhood offering bayfront and golf-course homes with pool and tennis amenities.
shortDescription: Corey’s Landing is a gated Bay Isles neighborhood featuring a community pool and tennis, with a mix of bayfront and golf-course-oriented properties. It’s great for those who want a residential neighborhood vibe inside Bay Isles while staying close to Longboat Key Club amenities.
